TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == S-te-ke-al-mo / Stockholm "Loy-tyen a kamu, Stockholm, Loy-tyen pangiha, ('st…ĒŐākňź …Ēlm) , tiziay a layak uzuma pangangan han ci-wi-s-cin", Loy-tyen angangan nu tukay atu satabakiay a tukuy, nu S-te-ke-al-mo akuwan nu saayaway a sehu. Loy-tyen a kanatal cen-bu, tatengilan nu kanatal atu Loy-tyen hungti a luma'a aednengan sehu a luma' hatu patizeng i S-te-ke-al-mo. śĖĮŚĺ∑Śď•ÁąĺśĎ©(ÁĎěŚÖłŤ™ě:Stockholm,ÁĎěŚÖłŤ™ěÁôľťü≥:('st…ĒŐākňź …Ēlm) . nilaculan kitizaan i Loy-tyen sawalian a dadipasan, micapi tu bayu nu Pow-low, Mey-la-lun taku micumud i labu nu bayu, salungan ku hekal, u singanganay nu piluwkuan. u tukay maliwasak i 14 a subal atu cacay malalutinay a subalan, 70 kayadah ku sangaw palungen palacacay kuyni a subal, namahiza singangan tu kapahay a ngangan tu " pey-bang-Wi-ni-s". S-te-ke-al-mo a kitizaan nu Ta-s-te-ke-al-muay. makay 13 se-ci malingatu, S-te-ke-al-mo mala Loy-tyen tu nu cen-ce, lalangawan, keyzay atu kitizaan nu satulil. S-te-ke-al-mo uyzasa a caay ka peci' nu ngangayaw a kapah ku nisinga', ayza pulung iza ku 100 ku pow-u-kwan atu singanganay a piazihan, pasu likisi, binacadan, lalayan, njkulitanz tu cacanan. S-te-ke-al-mo u kaw-ke-ci a tukuy, iza yadah ku talakaway a cacudadan, macakat aku kusi. S-te-ke-al-mo sa u niyazu' nu A-bow-lye.Now-pey-al. makay 1901 a mihcaan amalingatu, paymihcaan 12 a bulad 10 a dimiad u pikiningay a demiad tu nikapatay ni Now-pey-al, S-te-ke-al-mo a pidadiwan mikawaw tabakiay a salisin, Loy-tyen a hungti teked pabeli pakala tu sikawlay tu Now-pey-al a sikawlah, a itini seyhu a tumunaw mikawaw palabang. . likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ duduc tu saayaway a nisulitan tu likisi, pakala i 1252 a m kihcaan, S-te-ke-al-mo u mukin ba'tu ku salaliyu papacakay tu tuud u kahenulan a kitizaan. S-te-ke-al-mo "Stockholm" i Loy-tyen a kamuan u kasuy sa "stock" atu adidi'ay a subal "holm", uyni adidi'ay a subal uyza ayzaay a S-te-ke-al-mo-se-cung-sin nu balakiay tu a tukay. S-te-ke-al-mo u kamu nu Pi-al-ye-pow-c ue a nipatizang, patucekan mitena' tu midebungay nu taway a kanatal kayngung atu milalang tu Mey-la-lun lilisay a taku nu Si-ke-ti-na-cen tu pialaw. tukay nipili'ay a puenengan u kapahay a mkinatu, matatungus pilisasaan nu balunga. . S-te-ke-al-mo a pingayaw atu keyzay a kahenulan, tini I Ka-al-ma a kalacabay mikedliday Tan-may hungti atu Loy-tin labu nu kanatal misatekeday madademec tu icelang mala u kahenulan. 1520 a mihcaan, Tan-may micalap tu S-te-ke-al-mo. uyza a mkihcaan 11 a bulad 8 a dimiad, Tan-may malingatu caay ku ada mipac uk tu misakinihay, i likisi misebek mipatay ku S-te-ke-al-mo sa. uyni pipatay malangat tu ku katuuday malalebu tu , sazikuzay mabetas tu ku Ka-al-ma a sakaput. . keyzayÁ∂ďśŅü S-te-ke-al-mo nu Loy-tyen an gangan nu keyzay, kusi anisangaa' u aca atu tuud saacacay han pacakay pulung nu kalisiw pakalecad macalap ku hamin nu kanatal i pabaw tu 20%, izaw ku mukin kikay sapisanga',sapayuay, misanga'ay tu tatipeluk, in-swa, kakanan cacanan kahenulan a kawawan. hamin nu kanatal paytabakiay a kusi puljung izaw ku 45% patizang itini. S-te-ke-al-mo satabakiay a nilacul u miedapay a kawaw, pawapen tu pakala tu 85% ku pisakakawawan. S-te-ke-al-mo inayay ku baketay a pikawawan, ciniza i kitakit mala u satamelacay nu tabakiay a tukay. malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan .
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-mo / sto ¶kńßor~…ĺm "r~…ĺoj-tj…ôn a kamu, sto ¶kńßor~…ĺm, r~…ĺoj-tj…ôn paŇčińßa, ( Ē~ °st**k* *r~…ĺm) , tiziaj a r~…ĺajak uzuma paŇčaŇčan ńßan ¶i-wi-s- ¶in", r~…ĺoj-tj…ôn aŇčaŇčan nu tukaj atu satabakiaj a tukuj, nu s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-mo akuwan nu saajawaj a s…ôńßu. r~…ĺoj-tj…ôn a kanatar~…ĺ ¶…ôn-bu, tat…ôŇčir~…ĺan nu kanatar~…ĺ atu r~…ĺoj-tj…ôn ńßuŇčti a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °a a…ôdn…ôŇčan s…ôńßu a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ńßatu patiz…ôŇč i s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-mo. *****(***:sto ¶kńßor~…ĺm,*****:( Ē~ °st**k* *r~…ĺm) . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan kitizaan i r~…ĺoj-tj…ôn sawar~…ĺian a dadipasan, mi ¶api tu baju nu pow-r~…ĺow, m…ô-r~…ĺa-r~…ĺun taku mi ¶umud i r~…ĺabu nu baju, sar~…ĺuŇčan ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, u siŇčaŇčanaj nu pir~…ĺuwkuan. u tukaj mar~…ĺiwasak i ** a subar~…ĺ atu ¶a ¶aj mar~…ĺar~…ĺutinaj a subar~…ĺan, ** kajadańß ku saŇčaw par~…ĺuŇč…ôn par~…ĺa ¶a ¶aj kujni a subar~…ĺ, namańßiza siŇčaŇčan tu kapańßaj a ŇčaŇčan tu " p…ô-baŇč-wi-ni-s". s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-mo a kitizaan nu ta-s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-muaj. makaj ** s…ô- ¶i mar~…ĺiŇčatu, s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-mo mar~…ĺa r~…ĺoj-tj…ôn tu nu ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, k…ôzaj atu kitizaan nu satur~…ĺir~…ĺ. s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-mo ujzasa a ¶aaj ka p…ô ¶i Ē~ ° nu ŇčaŇčajaw a kapańß ku nisiŇča Ē~ °, ajza pur~…ĺuŇč iza ku *** ku pow-u-kwan atu siŇčaŇčanaj a piazińßan, pasu r~…ĺikisi, bina ¶adan, r~…ĺar~…ĺajan, njkur~…ĺitanz tu ¶a ¶anan. s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-mo u kaw-k…ô- ¶i a tukuj, iza jadańß ku tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan, ma ¶akat aku kusi. s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-mo sa u nijazu Ē~ ° nu a-bow-r~…ĺj…ô.now-p…ô-ar~…ĺ. makaj **** a mińß ¶aan amar~…ĺiŇčatu, pajmińß ¶aan ** a bur~…ĺad ** a dimiad u pikiniŇčaj a d…ômiad tu nikapataj ni now-p…ô-ar~…ĺ, s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-mo a pidadiwan mikawaw tabakiaj a sar~…ĺisin, r~…ĺoj-tj…ôn a ńßuŇčti t…ôk…ôd pab…ôr~…ĺi pakar~…ĺa tu sikawr~…ĺaj tu now-p…ô-ar~…ĺ a sikawr~…ĺańß, a itini s…ôńßu a tumunaw mikawaw par~…ĺabaŇč. . r~…ĺikisi ** dudu ¶ tu saajawaj a nisur~…ĺitan tu r~…ĺikisi, pakar~…ĺa i **** a m kińß ¶aan, s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-mo u mukin ba Ē~ °tu ku sar~…ĺar~…ĺiju papa ¶akaj tu tuud u kańß…ônur~…ĺan a kitizaan. s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-mo "sto ¶kńßor~…ĺm" i r~…ĺoj-tj…ôn a kamuan u kasuj sa "sto ¶k" atu adidi Ē~ °aj a subar~…ĺ "ńßor~…ĺm", ujni adidi Ē~ °aj a subar~…ĺ ujza ajzaaj a s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-mo-s…ô- ¶uŇč-sin nu bar~…ĺakiaj tu a tukaj. s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-mo u kamu nu pi-ar~…ĺ-j…ô-pow- ¶ u…ô a nipatizaŇč, patu ¶…ôkan mit…ôna Ē~ ° tu mid…ôbuŇčaj nu tawaj a kanatar~…ĺ kajŇčuŇč atu mir~…ĺar~…ĺaŇč tu m…ô-r~…ĺa-r~…ĺun r~…ĺir~…ĺisaj a taku nu si-k…ô-ti-na- ¶…ôn tu piar~…ĺaw. tukaj nipir~…ĺi Ē~ °aj a pu…ôn…ôŇčan u kapańßaj a mkinatu, matatuŇčus pir~…ĺisasaan nu bar~…ĺuŇča. . s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-mo a piŇčajaw atu k…ôzaj a kańß…ônur~…ĺan, tini i ka-ar~…ĺ-ma a kar~…ĺa ¶abaj mik…ôdr~…ĺidaj tan-maj ńßuŇčti atu r~…ĺoj-tin r~…ĺabu nu kanatar~…ĺ misat…ôk…ôdaj madad…ôm…ô ¶ tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč mar~…ĺa u kańß…ônur~…ĺan. **** a mińß ¶aan, tan-maj mi ¶ar~…ĺap tu s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-mo. ujza a mkińß ¶aan ** a bur~…ĺad * a dimiad, tan-maj mar~…ĺiŇčatu ¶aaj ku ada mipa ¶ uk tu misakinińßaj, i r~…ĺikisi mis…ôb…ôk mipataj ku s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-mo sa. ujni pipataj mar~…ĺaŇčat tu ku katuudaj mar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu tu , sazikuzaj mab…ôtas tu ku ka-ar~…ĺ-ma a sakaput. . k…ôzaj** s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-mo nu r~…ĺoj-tj…ôn an gaŇčan nu k…ôzaj, kusi anisaŇčaa Ē~ ° u a ¶a atu tuud saa ¶a ¶aj ńßan pa ¶akaj pur~…ĺuŇč nu kar~…ĺisiw pakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ma ¶ar~…ĺap ku ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ i pabaw tu **%, izaw ku mukin kikaj sapisaŇča Ē~ °,sapajuaj, misaŇča Ē~ °aj tu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk, in-swa, kakanan ¶a ¶anan kańß…ônur~…ĺan a kawawan. ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ pajtabakiaj a kusi pur~…ĺjuŇč izaw ku **% patizaŇč itini. s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-mo satabakiaj a nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u mi…ôdapaj a kawaw, pawap…ôn tu pakar~…ĺa tu **% ku pisakakawawan. s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-mo inajaj ku bak…ôtaj a pikawawan, ¶iniza i kitakit mar~…ĺa u satam…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj nu tabakiaj a tukaj. mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan .
S.FORM: == kakiliman == S-te-ke-al-mo / Stockholm "Loy-tyen a kamu, Stockholm, Loy-tyen pangiha, ('st…ĒŐākňź …Ēlm) , tiziay a layak uzuma pangangan han ci-wi-s-cin", Loy-tyen angangan nu tukay atu satabakiay a tukuy, nu S-te-ke-al-mo akuwan nu saayaway a sehu. Loy-tyen a kanatal cen-bu, tatengilan nu kanatal atu Loy-tyen hungti a luma'a aednengan sehu a luma' hatu patizeng i S-te-ke-al-mo. śĖĮŚĺ∑Śď•ÁąĺśĎ©(ÁĎěŚÖłŤ™ě:Stockholm,ÁĎěŚÖłŤ™ěÁôľťü≥:('st…ĒŐākňź …Ēlm) . nilaculan kitizaan i Loy-tyen sawalian a dadipasan, micapi tu bayu nu Pow-low, Mey-la-lun taku micumud i labu nu bayu, salungan ku hekal, u singanganay nu piluwkuan. u tukay maliwasak i 14 a subal atu cacay malalutinay a subalan, 70 kayadah ku sangaw palungen palacacay kuyni a subal, namahiza singangan tu kapahay a ngangan tu " pey-bang-Wi-ni-s". S-te-ke-al-mo a kitizaan nu Ta-s-te-ke-al-muay. makay 13 se-ci malingatu, S-te-ke-al-mo mala Loy-tyen tu nu cen-ce, lalangawan, keyzay atu kitizaan nu satulil. S-te-ke-al-mo uyzasa a caay ka peci' nu ngangayaw a kapah ku nisinga', ayza pulung iza ku 100 ku pow-u-kwan atu singanganay a piazihan, pasu likisi, binacadan, lalayan, njkulitanz tu cacanan. S-te-ke-al-mo u kaw-ke-ci a tukuy, iza yadah ku talakaway a cacudadan, macakat aku kusi. S-te-ke-al-mo sa u niyazu' nu A-bow-lye.Now-pey-al. makay 1901 a mihcaan amalingatu, paymihcaan 12 a bulad 10 a dimiad u pikiningay a demiad tu nikapatay ni Now-pey-al, S-te-ke-al-mo a pidadiwan mikawaw tabakiay a salisin, Loy-tyen a hungti teked pabeli pakala tu sikawlay tu Now-pey-al a sikawlah, a itini seyhu a tumunaw mikawaw palabang. . likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ duduc tu saayaway a nisulitan tu likisi, pakala i 1252 a m kihcaan, S-te-ke-al-mo u mukin ba'tu ku salaliyu papacakay tu tuud u kahenulan a kitizaan. S-te-ke-al-mo "Stockholm" i Loy-tyen a kamuan u kasuy sa "stock" atu adidi'ay a subal "holm", uyni adidi'ay a subal uyza ayzaay a S-te-ke-al-mo-se-cung-sin nu balakiay tu a tukay. S-te-ke-al-mo u kamu nu Pi-al-ye-pow-c ue a nipatizang, patucekan mitena' tu midebungay nu taway a kanatal kayngung atu milalang tu Mey-la-lun lilisay a taku nu Si-ke-ti-na-cen tu pialaw. tukay nipili'ay a puenengan u kapahay a mkinatu, matatungus pilisasaan nu balunga. . S-te-ke-al-mo a pingayaw atu keyzay a kahenulan, tini I Ka-al-ma a kalacabay mikedliday Tan-may hungti atu Loy-tin labu nu kanatal misatekeday madademec tu icelang mala u kahenulan. 1520 a mihcaan, Tan-may micalap tu S-te-ke-al-mo. uyza a mkihcaan 11 a bulad 8 a dimiad, Tan-may malingatu caay ku ada mipac uk tu misakinihay, i likisi misebek mipatay ku S-te-ke-al-mo sa. uyni pipatay malangat tu ku katuuday malalebu tu , sazikuzay mabetas tu ku Ka-al-ma a sakaput. . keyzayÁ∂ďśŅü S-te-ke-al-mo nu Loy-tyen an gangan nu keyzay, kusi anisangaa' u aca atu tuud saacacay han pacakay pulung nu kalisiw pakalecad macalap ku hamin nu kanatal i pabaw tu 20%, izaw ku mukin kikay sapisanga',sapayuay, misanga'ay tu tatipeluk, in-swa, kakanan cacanan kahenulan a kawawan. hamin nu kanatal paytabakiay a kusi puljung izaw ku 45% patizang itini. S-te-ke-al-mo satabakiay a nilacul u miedapay a kawaw, pawapen tu pakala tu 85% ku pisakakawawan. S-te-ke-al-mo inayay ku baketay a pikawawan, ciniza i kitakit mala u satamelacay nu tabakiay a tukay. malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan .
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-mo / sto ¶kńßor~…ĺm "r~…ĺoj-tj…ôn a kamu, sto ¶kńßor~…ĺm, r~…ĺoj-tj…ôn paŇčińßa, ( Ē~ °st**k* *r~…ĺm) , tiziaj a r~…ĺajak uzuma paŇčaŇčan ńßan ¶i-wi-s- ¶in", r~…ĺoj-tj…ôn aŇčaŇčan nu tukaj atu satabakiaj a tukuj, nu s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-mo akuwan nu saajawaj a s…ôńßu. r~…ĺoj-tj…ôn a kanatar~…ĺ ¶…ôn-bu, tat…ôŇčir~…ĺan nu kanatar~…ĺ atu r~…ĺoj-tj…ôn ńßuŇčti a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °a a…ôdn…ôŇčan s…ôńßu a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ńßatu patiz…ôŇč i s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-mo. *****(***:sto ¶kńßor~…ĺm,*****:( Ē~ °st**k* *r~…ĺm) . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan kitizaan i r~…ĺoj-tj…ôn sawar~…ĺian a ¶aaj ka p…ô ¶i Ē~ ° nu ŇčaŇčajaw a kapańß ku nisiŇča Ē~ °, ajza pur~…ĺuŇč iza ku *** ku pow-u-kwan atu siŇčaŇčanaj a piazińßan, pasu r~…ĺikisi, bina ¶adan, r~…ĺar~…ĺajan, njkur~…ĺitanz tu ¶a ¶anan. amar~…ĺiŇčatu, pajmińß ¶aan ** a bur~…ĺad ** a dimiad u pikiniŇčaj a d…ômiad tu nikapataj ni now-p…ô-ar~…ĺ, s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-mo a pidadiwan mikawaw tabakiaj a sar~…ĺisin, r~…ĺoj-tj…ôn a ńßuŇčti t…ôk…ôd adidi Ē~ °aj a subar~…ĺ "ńßor~…ĺm", ujni adidi Ē~ °aj a subar~…ĺ ujza ajzaaj a s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-mo-s…ô- ¶uŇč-sin nu bar~…ĺakiaj tu a tukaj. s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-mo u kamu nu pi-ar~…ĺ-j…ô-pow- ¶ u…ô a nipatizaŇč, patu ¶…ôkan mit…ôna Ē~ ° tu mid…ôbuŇčaj nu tawaj a kanatar~…ĺ kajŇčuŇč atu mir~…ĺar~…ĺaŇč tu m…ô-r~…ĺa-r~…ĺun r~…ĺir~…ĺisaj a taku nu si-k…ô-ti-na- ¶…ôn tu piar~…ĺaw. tukaj nipir~…ĺi Ē~ °aj a pu…ôn…ôŇčan u kapańßaj a mkinatu, matatuŇčus pir~…ĺisasaan nu bar~…ĺuŇča. . s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-mo a piŇčajaw atu k…ôzaj a kańß…ônur~…ĺan, tini i ka-ar~…ĺ-ma a kar~…ĺa ¶abaj mik…ôdr~…ĺidaj tan-maj ńßuŇčti atu r~…ĺoj-tin r~…ĺabu nu kanatar~…ĺ misat…ôk…ôdaj madad…ôm…ô ¶ tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč mar~…ĺa u kańß…ônur~…ĺan. **** a mińß ¶aan, tan-maj mi ¶ar~…ĺap tu s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-mo. ujza a mkińß ¶aan ** a bur~…ĺad * a dimiad, tan-maj mar~…ĺiŇčatu ¶aaj ku ada mipa ¶ uk tu misakinińßaj, i r~…ĺikisi mis…ôb…ôk mipataj ku s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-mo sa. ujni pipataj mar~…ĺaŇčat tu ku katuudaj mar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu tu , sazikuzaj mab…ôtas tu ku ka-ar~…ĺ-ma a sakaput. . k…ôzaj** s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-mo nu r~…ĺoj-tj…ôn an gaŇčan nu k…ôzaj, kusi anisaŇčaa Ē~ ° u a ¶a atu tuud saa ¶a ¶aj ńßan pa ¶akaj pur~…ĺuŇč nu kar~…ĺisiw pakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ma ¶ar~…ĺap ku ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ i pabaw tu **%, izaw ku mukin kikaj sapisaŇča Ē~ °,sapajuaj, misaŇča Ē~ °aj tu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk, in-swa, kakanan ¶a ¶anan kańß…ônur~…ĺan a kawawan. ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ pajtabakiaj a kusi pur~…ĺjuŇč izaw ku **% patizaŇč itini. s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-mo satabakiaj a nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u mi…ôdapaj a kawaw, pawap…ôn tu pakar~…ĺa tu **% ku pisakakawawan. s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-mo inajaj ku bak…ôtaj a pikawawan, ¶iniza i kitakit mar~…ĺa u satam…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj nu tabakiaj a tukaj. mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan .
